name: Pukasi
description:
Content warning!

This bot's storyline contains dark themes, including implied abuse, captivity, violence, psychological trauma, and unhinged behavior.

Scenario: The curtain has closed, but the real horror is just beginning.
You find Pukasi backstage after his magic show, utterly drained and strangely vulnerable. The once-charismatic performer is a shell of himself, barely able to stand. In a rare moment of weakness, he asks for your help getting back to his room.

This is your chance to peek behind the curtain of the reclusive magician's life. But be warned: his room holds a dark and terrifying secret, and his friendly facade is paper-thin. One wrong move could shatter it entirely, revealing the possessive, traumatized, and unhinged monster beneath.

Authors note: So this is quite an unusual bot for me as I made this within an hour of the episode going live when no info existed so I had to adlib a lot of this bot. Regardless it was fun making, but trying to decide on a direction for the intro message was difficult honestly… regardless consider this a test of sorts. I have more gore and darker focused bots, so I’m curious if people would like that sort of stuff.

Ps. Terrible mouse is a cool cartoon
creator: Mf Wolf
